# Solenix Solutions

> Solenix Solutions is a manufacturer of solar mounting systems and accessories based in Jalandhar, Punjab, India, supplying EPC companies, distributors and solar professionals across India.

Tagline: Power That Holds.

## Contact
- Website: https://solenixsolutions.com/
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 94171 22679
- Email: solenixsolutions@gmail.com
- Address: Adjoining Kosmo Tata showroom, Kapurthala Road, Jalandhar, Punjab, India
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/solenixsolutions

## About
Solenix Solutions manufactures and supplies solar mounting hardware — clamps, base plates and brackets, fasteners, rails and structures, plus solar electrical and earthing components. Products serve rooftop and ground-mount solar projects and are trusted by installers and EPC contractors. Bulk manufacturing, fast delivery, PAN-India dispatch. Every enquiry and quote is handled over WhatsApp, phone or email above.

## Product range (27 products across 6 categories)

### Clamps
- GI Solgrip Clamp — High-grip galvanized clamp with a deep jaw for a firm, slip-free hold — a dependable workhorse across mounting jobs.
- HDG Mid Clamp — Hot-dip galvanized mid clamp with a thick zinc coat for maximum rust protection on coastal and high-exposure sites.
- Alu Mid Clamp — Aluminium mid clamp that locks two adjacent panels onto the mounting rail with a single bolt. Light, corrosion-resistant and quick to torque down.
- GI Mid Clamp — Complete galvanized mid-clamp kit — clamp, spring nut and bolt in one pack, ready to install straight from the carton.
- GI End Clamp — Galvanized end-clamp kit with full hardware for fixing the row's outer panels — matched parts, no mixing and matching on site.
- Anti-Theft Clamp — Security clamps that resist tampering and deter removal of installed panels — added peace of mind for open and remote sites.

### Base Plates & Brackets
- GI Strut Base Plate — Galvanized base plate for strut channel uprights. Gives every leg of the structure a stable, square seat on the mounting surface.
- GI B4 Base Plate — Welded galvanized B4 base plate that anchors vertical structure legs to the roof or civil foundation, pre-punched for anchor fasteners.
- GI C Lip Base Plate — Rigid galvanized base plate sized for C-lip profiles, spreading the structure load evenly into the foundation.
- GI Degree Angle — Galvanized degree angle that sets and holds the tilt of the mounting structure. Multiple holes allow on-site adjustment.

### Fasteners & Hardware
- GI Spring Nut — Galvanized spring channel nut that drops into strut channel and springs into position — fast, tool-free placement before bolting.
- Wedge Anchor Fastener — Expansion wedge anchor for fixing base plates into concrete. Expands as it tightens for heavy-duty pull-out strength.
- Rawl Anchor Fastener — Heavy-duty rawl bolts for anchoring structures into concrete and masonry, supplied in the common sizes installers reach for.
- Water Clips — Snap-on drainage clips that fit the panel frame edge and let standing water and dust wash clear — cleaner glass, less soiling loss.
- GI Strut Jointer — Slotted galvanized connector that splices two strut channel lengths into one continuous, load-bearing run.
- GI Nut Bolt & Washer — Galvanized nut, bolt and washer sets in standard sizes — consistent plating and threads for smooth assembly.
- GI J Hook — Galvanized J-hook bolts with nuts and washers that tie the mounting structure down to purlins and sheet roofs — a fast, secure grip without welding.

### Rails & Structures
- Rafters JSW/Apollo — Branded JSW and Apollo GI rafters for solar structures — trusted steel, supplied cut to your project's spans.
- Alu Monorail — Low-profile aluminium mounting rail — light to carry up a roof, strong in span, with a channel that takes standard clamp hardware.

### Solar Panels
- Solar Panels — High-efficiency solar modules sourced from trusted manufacturers, supplied alongside our mounting hardware — panels and structure in one coordinated order.

### Electrical & Earthing
- MC4 Connectors — Weatherproof MC4 plug-and-socket pairs for solar DC cabling — positive click-lock connections that stay sealed outdoors.
- ACDB Box — Pre-wired AC distribution box with MCB and surge protection — safe isolation between inverter and grid, ready to mount and wire.
- DCDB Box — Pre-wired DC distribution box with fuse and surge protection on the string side — protects panels and inverter from faults and lightning surges.
- AC Wire — Multi-strand AC cables in standard sizes and coil lengths for inverter-to-board runs — consistent cores and insulation for clean, compliant wiring.
- DC Wire — Solar-grade DC cables built for outdoor UV and heat exposure — standard sizes for string wiring, supplied in easy-to-handle coils.
- Copper Bonded Earthing Rod — Copper-bonded earthing rods with strips for low-resistance grounding of solar arrays — long service life even in aggressive soil.
- Copper Bonded Lightning Arrester — Rooftop lightning arrester kit that intercepts strikes and routes the surge safely to earth, protecting panels and inverters.

## Notes
- Catalog last updated: July 2026.
- No online checkout: all pricing and orders are quoted directly via WhatsApp / phone / email.
- Preferred entity name everywhere: "Solenix Solutions".
